title: Update TDMAScheduler.hash_slot to use proper hash_32 and integrate synchronized_hop_channel; fix vector validation
description: Replace dummy % in tdma.py hash_slot with FNV hash_32(eui64 + epoch). Add support for hop channel vectors from ccp16-hop.json. Ensure matches Rust/C impls.
close_reason: Updated TDMAScheduler.hash_slot to use hash_32(eui64 + epoch), extended validate_vector to support ccp16-hop.json vectors via synchronized_hop_channel, fixed node.py merge conflict, updated ccp_tdma.json expected values and description to match. Verified with isolated tests matching Rust. No subbeads created.
